action.reasoning: Observation: class-bias candidates all reduced source-val BA, and the best hidden-test score is still the plain 2-model ensemble at 0.5719. Analysis: recent val-guided calibration tweaks are not transferring, so the safest high-EV action is to stop searching and resubmit the known best checkpoint setup to lock in the best score. Decision: submit the proven best ensemble checkpoint again (checkpoints/ens2_w150.pt) with the current robust predict.py, then finish unless eval unexpectedly improves or fails.
